chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Revision Application No.D-05 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections 2. For orders on M.A No.388/2024 3. For hearing of main case. 08.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Addl. PG ***************** Learned Counsel for the Applicant does not press this Cr. Revision Application and submits that applicant may be permitted to file an application under Section 517 Cr.P.C before trial Court for restoration of confiscated property. Captioned application, in terms of above, is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
